mapper.sql: id, order_no, idempotency_key, securities_account_id, member_id, stock_code, order_side, quantity, order_price, order_amount, fee, tax, total_amount, quote_observed_at, status, failure_reason, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO securities_orders ( order_no, idempotency_key, securities_account_id, member_id, stock_code, order_side, quantity, order_price, order_amount, fee, tax, total_amount, quote_observed_at, status ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{securitiesAccountId}, #{memberId}, #{stockCode}, #{orderSide}, #{quantity}, #{orderPrice}, #{orderAmount}, #{fee}, #{tax}, #{totalAmount}, #{quoteObservedAt}, 'REQUESTED' )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM securities_orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE securities_orders SET status = 'FUNDS_COMPLETED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE securities_orders SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = #{completedAt}, failure_reason = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'FUNDS_COMPLETED'
UPDATE securities_orders SET status = 'CANCELED', failure_reason = #{failureReason}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('REQUESTED', 'FAILED')
